mapper.update: UPDATE sys_open_app SET app_name = #{appName}, app_type = #{appType}, status = #{status}, rate_limit = #{rateLimit}, ip_whitelist = #{ipWhitelist}, expire_time = #{expireTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE sys_open_app SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT id, app_key, app_secret, app_name, app_type, status, rate_limit, ip_whitelist, expire_time, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version FROM sys_open_app WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, app_key, app_secret, app_name, app_type, status, rate_limit, ip_whitelist, expire_time, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version FROM sys_open_app WHERE app_key = #{appKey} AND deleted = FALSE
